calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Josephine Neyyan, Plaintiff/ Respondent
Adrian Castaneda Juarez Plaintiff/ Respondent

Kushagra Khandelwal Defendant/Appellant

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Josephine Neyyan, Plaintiff/ Respondent testifies on her own behalf.
Adrian Castaneda Juarez Plaintiff/ Respondent testifies on his own behalf.

Kushagra Khandelwal Defendant/Appellant testifies on his behalf.

Mr. Khandelwal presents the Court with an envelope of photos, receipts and miscellaneous forms to be considered. Exhibit was not marked.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

The parties are advised that exhibits may be picked up within 30 days after the decision has been issued or they will be destroyed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss, R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (305).
